headline.text: L3 ML4 gondola jammed *three times* in 17 minutes — aligner also rejecting everything, both still down at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran routine changeovers and weekend cleaning on Sollich 3, targeting 10:00 start. No production issues in the window.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 FFS completed 8.4 oz setup by 07:01 after a short changeover. ML2 had a Monday morning materials delay — caramel and chocolate delivery plus single warehouse resource on busiest shift — but reached temp and resumed. ML3 running great.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 Truffle and MF Matrix started on time with clean runs. ML1 waiting on temper adjustments at window close. ML4 started depositing at 05:03 but went down at 06:50 with recurring gondola entrance jams (three in 17 minutes) and an aligner fault rejecting all product to scrap; both issues active at 07:07.

resolved.title: ML2 Monday morning materials delay
resolved.summary: Caramel and chocolate delivery delayed by single warehouse resource on busiest Monday shift; room-temp caramel had to reach acceptable temperature before run could start.
resolved.resolution: Materials delivered and caramel reached acceptable temp by 06:36; Jeffrey Barney confirmed line resumed after warm caramel added to speed heating.

resolved.title: FFS line setup for 8.4 oz
resolved.summary: Line setup for 8.4 oz pack size completed and running by 07:01.
resolved.resolution: Setup completed by 07:01 — "Line is running" (Jeffrey Barney).

needs_attention.title: ML4 recurring gondola entrance jams
needs_attention.summary: Product not entering gondola slat properly; line down at 06:50, ran 3 minutes then jammed again at 06:53, down again at 07:07 after speed reduction to 15 mpm.
needs_attention.status: Three jams in 17 minutes. Chad suggested reducing from 18 to 15 mpm at 07:00; line jammed again at 07:07. Still down at window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 aligner rejecting all product, high scrap
needs_attention.summary: Aligner not separating properly and rejecting everything to discharge; creating significant scrap while Felix is in a meeting.
needs_attention.status: Aligner fault active as of 06:59, no resolution by window close. Felix unavailable (in meeting).

needs_attention.title: ML4 chiller temperature issues on WDS coolers
needs_attention.summary: WDS cooler temperatures out of range; maintenance looking at the chiller.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance looking at chiller as of 06:45, no resolution posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 temper unit adjustments in progress
needs_attention.summary: Preston making adjustments to temper unit; line still waiting for temper at window close.
needs_attention.status: Preston in the line making temper adjustments as of 07:05, no ETA. Chad noted settings may not have saved from last week's modifications.

needs_attention.title: ML4 tablet locked, cannot post checklists
needs_attention.summary: ML4 TG tablet (Lenovo) locked with unknown password; operators unable to post any checklists.
needs_attention.status: Tablet locked as of 07:03. Jorel Gourdin confirmed he did not set up that device and cannot help.
